name: Penabur International School

intelligence.verdict: Part of BPK Penabur, Indonesia's largest Christian school network. Cambridge curriculum. Strong academics. Fees not publicly disclosed.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
